hooks.command: COMMAND=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo "$TOOL_INPUT"); case "$COMMAND" in git\ commit*) FOUND=$(cd /home/gabriel/Documentos/degux.cl && grep -rl --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' 'PGPASSWORD\|client_secret\|privateKey\|sk-live\|AIzaSy' src/ 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "Hardcoded secrets detected in: $FOUND"; exit 2; fi ;; esac

COMMAND=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo "$TOOL_INPUT"); case "$COMMAND" in git\ add*) cd /home/gabriel/Documentos/degux.cl && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | head -20 || true ;; esac
